name: HRA_PF_TASK_DEFNS_VL
query: SELECT TDB.TASK_ID, TDB.TASK_CODE, TDB.ACTIVE_FLAG, TDB.MODULE_ID, TDB.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, TDTL.TASK_NAME, TDB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, TDB.CREATED_BY, TDB.CREATION_DATE, TDB.LAST_UPDATED_BY, TDB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, TDB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRA_PF_TASK_DEFNS_B TDB, HRA_PF_TASK_DEFNS_TL TDTL WHERE TDB.TASK_ID = TDTL.TASK_ID AND TDB.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = TDTL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND TDTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
